title: How to update communication in board
excerpt:
Hi, 
As per the monday.com playground we can update board attributes for description and communication. For communication we could not find valid input. The description says “Object that contains available Video conferen…

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

As per the monday.com playground we can update board attributes for description and communication. For communication we could not find valid input. The description says “Object that contains available Video conferences on the board.”.

Could you please provide what is the valid input for communication.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Yash!

This is tipically used for Zoom meetings.

Example:

mutation {
  update_board(board_id: 1234567890, board_attribute: communication, new_value: "{ \"meeting_id\": \"string\", \"start_url\": \"string\", \"join_url\": \"string\"}")
}

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply @Matias.Monday. This really helped us understand the request.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
